reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect RedBot Media Player
reauth_confirm.description: Update and verify Red RPC connection settings.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure RedBot Media Player
reconfigure.description: Update and verify integration connection settings.

user.title: RedBot Media Player
user.description: Connect to Red-DiscordBot JSON-RPC over WebSocket. Red must run with --rpc (default port 6133). Load the ha_red_rpc cog and Audio.

data_description.host: Use 127.0.0.1 when Home Assistant and Red run on the same machine. Red's RPC binds to localhost only, not your LAN IP (192.168.x.x). In Docker without host network, try host.docker.internal or the host gateway.
data_description.port: Default 6133. Red must be started with --rpc.
data_description.actor_user_id: User ID for Audio permission checks (often you or the server owner).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Red RPC. Use host 127.0.0.1 if HA is on the same host as Red; ensure Red runs with --rpc and port 6133. LAN IP will not work unless you proxy.

init.title: TheAudioDB artwork
init.description: Optional album and track art from TheAudioDB (theaudiodb.com). Uses artist and title from Red's now playing. Disable if you do not want outbound HTTPS to TheAudioDB.

data.audiodb_api_key: API key (v1 JSON path; default is the public test key)
